text.title: spatial-design-tools Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the spatial-design-tools methodology end-to-end.

step.name: classify-project-phase
step.action: Pick phase ∈ {concept, prototype, production}. Pick target-platforms list.

step.name: pick-tool-stack
step.action: Apply phase-gated-tools rule. Concept → Figma + ShapesXR; prototype → Unity or Unreal; production → engine + USD/glTF.
step.decision-gate: If mixing tools mid-phase, return and pick one.

step.name: set-asset-budgets
step.action: Set polygon-count, file-size, draw-call budgets per platform. Cite source (Meta docs, Apple Reality Composer guidance).
step.decision-gate: Budgets MUST be set before any artist work.

step.name: declare-asset-format
step.action: Pick format per platform: USDZ for visionOS, glTF 2.0 + KTX2 for Quest/Web/Android XR. Document conversion path if mixed.

step.name: validate-config
step.action: Run validate-spatial-design-tools.py. Commit config to repo. Run in-engine prototype on real hardware before production starts.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix gaps before commit.
